tasks.subject: Task 0: Modal RIFE config + offline split characterization
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New modal-rife-60fps.yaml loads as a Modal (non-sky) interpolate cfg; rendered provision splits RIFE install into build_script and server exec into runtime_script.

**Files:** examples/configs/modal-rife-60fps.yaml (create), tests/test_modal_rife_config.py (create)

**Acceptance:** cfg loads (provider modal, no cloud key, interpolate rife/60fps); build_script has RIFE git clone Practical-RIFE + numpy<2 + RIFEv4.26 + torch==2.6.0, not server exec; runtime_script has wan_t2v_server exec not the installs.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/test_modal_rife_config.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/configs/modal-rife-60fps.yaml", "tests/test_modal_rife_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/test_modal_rife_config.py -v", "planTask": 0, "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: RED live scaffold (committed before spend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pytest.mark.live end-to-end scaffold for the Modal RIFE interpolate run, committed BEFORE live spend (durability rule).

**Files:** tests/live/test_modal_rife_60fps.py (create)

**Acceptance:** marked pytest.mark.live so `pixi run test` (-m 'not live') skips it (offline suite green); under -m live drives kinoforge interpolate + asserts ~60fps; committed RED.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/live/test_modal_rife_60fps.py -q (default env) → skipped, not run live.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_modal_rife_60fps.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_modal_rife_60fps.py -q", "planTask": 1, "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Live RIFE 60fps proof on Modal + frame-QA + teardown + §25
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run RIFE interpolate live on Modal (T4-first, fast boot); ~60fps clip; frame-QA; verify teardown; log §25 + PROGRESS. USER-GATE.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user in the current conversation. Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated with captured output.

**Files:** successful-generations.md (new §25), PROGRESS.md (RESUME SNAPSHOT)

**Acceptance:** preflight PASS; fast boot not preemption loop (numpy<2 build error fails fast at BUILD, no GPU spend, deviation-handled); output ~60fps ffprobe r_frame_rate=60/1 ~304 frames 480x480; frame-QA smooth pose deltas no ghosting; teardown clean (kinoforge list + modal app list); §25 written.

**Verify:** pixi run kinoforge list → No running instances + empty ledger; ffprobe → r_frame_rate=60/1; §25 present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["successful-generations.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run kinoforge list", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "one", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["source", "16fps", "input"], ["output", "60", "interpolated"]], "planTask": 2, "modelTier": "standard"}
```
